Retrieve audit logs within a specified date range with optional pagination filters.

parameters.name: fromdate
parameters.description: The beginning date from which to retrieve audit logs,should be in ISO 8601 format "YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.sssZ"

parameters.name: todate
parameters.description: The ending date from which to retrieve audit logs,should be in ISO 8601 format "YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.sssZ"

parameters.name: pagenumber
parameters.description: The page number of results pagination to request

parameters.name: pagesize
parameters.description: The number of log messages to return with each request up to a maximum of 100.

get.summary: Retrieve audit logs within a specified date range with optional pagination filters and total count.

parameters.name: fromDate
parameters.description: The beginning date from which to retrieve audit logs, should be in ISO 8601 format "YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.sssZ"

parameters.name: toDate
parameters.description: The ending date from which to retrieve audit logs, should be in ISO 8601 format "YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.sssZ"

parameters.name: pageNumber
parameters.description: The page number of results pagination to request

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The number of log messages to return with each request up to a maximum of 100.

delete.description: Delete records based on sent ids or query (filters).

parameters.name: appId
parameters.description: Application id, for records needed to be removed.

requestBody.description:
Definition of the scope of records.
            applicationId is ignored in favor of appId from route.
            Must provide either recordIds or filters.
            modifications are not used and should be ommited.

put.description:
Updates records based on sent ids or query (filters) with new Values provided.
Field identification in values can be id, name or key.
(SPT-34871) BatchRequest gets serialized for Execute call if iso date strings detected in TextFields.

parameters.name: appId
parameters.description: Application id, for records needed to be removed.

requestBody.description:
Definition of the scope of records and new values.
            applicationId is ignored in favor of appId from route.
            Must provide either recordIds or filters.
            modifications are mandatory.

Export request. That includes entrypoint
            ids and the entrypoint type. Also specifies the name for package.
